name: Shrimp Arnaud
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bag of shrimp according to package directions.
2. Drain the shrimp and let them cool completely.
3. In a bowl, combine the oil, white vinegar, chopped chives, chili sauce, hot mustard, and garlic. Season with salt.
4. Add the cooled shrimp to the mixture and toss well to coat evenly.
5. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 3 hours, tossing occasionally.
6. To serve, drain any excess liquid from the shrimp and sprinkle lightly with paprika.
